case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. JONATHAN SAJDA et al

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-01-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JONATHAN SAJDA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
